title: P2: format_ipv6 snprintf return value ignored, potential truncation
description: format_ipv6 calls snprintf but does not check its return value against buf_size. Although current format fits in 40 bytes, if format changes or buf_size smaller it could truncate without detection. Should check ret >=0 && ret < buf_size. Found during comment removal review of coap_status.c. Related to project-LICHEN-2bix.
